pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the compiler plugin is not configured for the target JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.13.0 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support compiling code for JDK 21 targets.
